title: Opening Tab is not "Connexions"
author: diabloNitz4
body_snippet:
Hello Everyone,

## Current Behavior
I am actually working for a compagny. We actually have the last stable mRemoteNG release version. We need to upgrade on the last one.

All is working fine exept when mRemoteNG is opening. The first view is on "Configuration" and not on "Connexions" what will make users "angry" and not very nice.

## Question, Bug
How it is possible to force the first view to be on "Connexion" or like before, to have half-half, "connexions" on top and "Configuration" b...

iterations.description: Issue body is empty and comments only indicate stale status/triage with no reproducible steps or clear description of what 'Opening Tab is not Connexions' means.
Verified: feature already implemented in codebase

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: Nightly build is not for work, to avoid users in organisations to destroy curent settings - save option was disabled, please wait for stable release of nightly

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Update from fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`**

Fixed. Settings save was disabled in upstream 1.77.3 NB — our fork has it re-enabled, so the startup panel layout (including the "Connexions" tab) now persists correctly between sessions.

Available in **[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed** and included in **[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed**.

notes: Settings save was disabled in upstream 1.77.3 NB. Our fork has it enabled — startup panel layout persists.
